stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 Figure 4.9.
For the forward cargo compartment (Cargo Hold 1), area between balance arms (BA) 286 in and 343 in, determine which of the 4 crates may be loaded:

options.a: Crate W: 8.30 kg/inch and 90 kg per ft2
options.b: Crate X: 8.56 kg/inch and 70 kg per ft2
options.c: Crate Y: 8.45 kg/inch and 67 kg per ft2
options.d: Crate Z: 6.56 kg/inch and 69 kg per ft2
